name: Chicken Fricassee with Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT CHICKEN INTO SERVING PIECES.
2. PARE CARROTS AND ONIONS IN A PAN.
3. ADD INSTANT CHICKEN BROTH, SALT, BAY LEAF, PEPPER, AND WATER TO THE PAN.
4. ADD CHICKEN TO THE PAN.
5. HEAT UNTIL IT REACHES BOILING POINT.
6. LOWER HEAT AND COVER; SIMMER FOR 30 MINUTES.
7. COMBINE FLOUR AND COLD WATER IN A CUP TO MAKE A SMOOTH PASTE.
8. STIR THE PASTE INTO THE BUBBLING CHICKEN LIQUID.
9. COOK CONSTANTLY UNTIL THE MIXTURE THICKENS.
10. DUMPLINGS: SIFT FLOUR, BAKING POWDER, AND SALT INTO A MEDIUM SIZE BOWL.
11. CUT SHORTENING WITH A PASTRY BLENDER.
12. STIR MILK UNTIL THE FLOUR IS MOIST.
13. DROP DUMPLING BATTER IN MOUNDS ON TOP OF STEAMING CHICKEN.
14. COOK COVERED FOR 20 MINUTES WITHOUT PEAKING; THEY WILL BE LIGHT AND FLUFFY.
